title: notebook-status input spec
description:
Inputs to ``notebook-status``.

All three relpaths / ids are resolved against the ``--experiment-dir``: the
``source`` and ``template`` are ``.py`` files in jupytext percent format
(parsed by the same section parser), and ``audit_id`` names the notebook
decision-journal scope whose sign-off / auto-clear records are replayed.

audit_id.description: The notebook decision-journal scope id (filesystem-safe slug) whose sign-off / auto-clear records are reduced. Caller-authored.
audit_id.title: Audit Id

source.description: Experiment-relative path to the audited source .py (jupytext percent format). Its per-section shas are recomputed fresh on every call.
source.title: Source

template.description: Experiment-relative path to the template .py. Its section slugs are the REQUIRED inventory the rollup verdict is computed over.
template.title: Template
